open_items.title: Review data for the partners
open_items.summary: Use inbound partner/vendor framing from the brain: partner means deals.vendor, not clever_offers_winning_partner. Start with Bankrate, Houzeo, iBuyer, Opendoor, Mr Cooper, Rabbu, LendingTree, and Carrington if the extract supports them.
open_items.draft_preview: Produce the partner metric readout before touching copy updates.

open_items.title: Find SOW meeting time and update metrics
open_items.summary: Drake is free 11:30 AM-12:00 PM ET and 4:15-4:45 PM ET around known calendar anchors. Best proposed hold: 11:30 AM ET; fallback: 4:15 PM ET after Juggle with Alan.
open_items.draft_preview: Draft the team scheduling note after confirming required attendees.

open_items.title: Inventory education sends and point them to the cash offer comparison tool
open_items.summary: Slack evidence says the new direction is to redo emails so they point agents to https://compare.cleveroffers.com/cash-offers. Local repo search did not find static education copy, so this needs a HubSpot/Slack/workflow inventory pass before edits.
open_items.draft_preview: Make the inventory first, then change references only where the current education send is confirmed.

timeline.title: Partner data review: sources, denominators, current metrics
timeline.notes: Use deals.vendor as the partner axis unless the task explicitly asks for downstream buyer/investor.

timeline.title: Update metrics snapshot for SOW/team discussion
timeline.notes: Output should be a short metric packet, not an exploratory notebook.

timeline.title: SOW meeting slot: confirm attendees and send proposed time
timeline.notes: Best Drake-available slot is 11:30 AM ET. Fallback is 4:15 PM ET. Required attendee set likely starts from prior SOW kickoff: Ben, Mike Bennett, Jay, Collins, Mike Provinzino.

timeline.title: Inventory every education send surface
timeline.notes: Check HubSpot forms/workflows, Slack launch/update references, agent emails, and any portal/handbook copy. Local offers_amp search found no static education-copy hits.

timeline.title: Draft replacement copy pointing to cash offer comparison tool
timeline.notes: Use https://compare.cleveroffers.com/cash-offers as the reference. Keep copy action-oriented: go to the tool, compare options, use the tool as source of truth.

timeline.title: Apply education reference swaps and send/update SOW metrics
timeline.notes: Use this block for confirmed edits only. If inventory reveals owned surfaces outside local repo access, produce the exact change list and owner handoff.

timeline.title: Closeout: DCC actuals, unresolved owners, tomorrow carryover
timeline.notes: Capture done/deferred/blocked reasons so the glymphatic review has actuals.

assessment.day_theme: Protect the morning for partner metrics and the education-reference migration, then use the late block to ship confirmed updates.
hard_commitments: All day: Work from Furman (transparent calendar context)
must_do: Review partner data using deals.vendor as the partner axis.
Produce/update the metric snapshot needed for the SOW team conversation.
Send or stage the SOW meeting scheduling note; proposed Drake-open slot is 11:30 AM ET.
Inventory all education-send surfaces before changing references.
nice_to_do: Turn the education inventory into a reusable checklist for future launches.
Add the final SOW meeting time to the calendar once the team confirms.
risks: Team availability is not fully known from Drake's primary calendar; do not assume the 11:30 AM slot works for everyone.
Local repo search did not reveal static education-copy surfaces, so the real owner may be HubSpot/workflows rather than code.
If the metrics pass sprawls, the education migration loses the only good pre-2 PM focus window.

lessons.title: Partner metric work should default to inbound vendor
lessons.text: For partner reporting or partner data review, default to deals.vendor unless the task explicitly says downstream winning buyer/investor.

lessons.text: The relevant education sends are likely split across HubSpot, Slack, emails, and operational docs; do not edit the first visible copy and assume coverage.
